silhouette: Rounded five-point star silhouette with soft inflated points and two small rounded feet directly under the lower star points in full-body views.
face: Large dot eyes, upbeat smile, glossy highlight marks near the upper left side.
body_language: Bouncy, welcoming, and always ready to launch into the next activity.
do_not_change: Keep the two small rounded feet visible in full-body views.
Leave clear lower-frame space so the small feet are not cropped away.
Do not make the points sharp or threatening.
